reviews.review_description:
I am not into boxing, but I like those mini games.

There are a few different game modes. 
Haven’t tried them all yet.  

The boxing games are very realistic. When you hit the opponent, you can see his swollen face. Love it.

reviews.review_title: 🥊  A Promising Knockout in Early Access
reviews.review_description:
What first struck me was the stunning clarity and realism of the heavyweight boxer standing in front of me — almost too lifelike for comfort! I actually found myself stepping back, impressed (and slightly intimidated) by the opponent’s imposing stature.

The AI is sharp — your rival dodges, counters, and attacks with skill, forcing you to level up fast if you want to win a round. The training area is also well-designed, offering a mix of classic exercises and a few refreshing new drills. Spending time there really helps perfect your combinations.

Overall, Championship Clash Boxing is a strong, well-balanced boxing experience and a great start for an early access title. The studio clearly shows real promise in the VR sports arena.

The fights feel so real, and the rush of finishing a match with a knockout punch that sends the other guy across the ring is just awesome. The training area with the boxing machine is really fun too, and it’s cool seeing it grow with updates — I hope they keep adding more!

developer_response.body: We have added Reflex Rings & Balance Blast Mini Game. You need to go to Sweat Zone & then Kiosk to play the game.

reviews.review_description: There’s no mixed reality feature. They took off some of the mini games, and the training is pretty basic in the ones you can currently play. You can’t even adjust height currently on the mma reflex bar. If it improves I’ll change my review but seems like this game is just getting worse!

developer_response.body:
MR is live now.

Access:
• MR: Sweat Zone → Mixed Reality
• Mini-games: Sweat Zone → Kiosk → Reflex Rings / Balance Blast / Stretch Quest

We paused a few experimental modes to stabilize core training; more drills & difficulty options are coming.

Coupon for anyone reading: ACECATCHUM_REVIEW-C55071
